历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 7638→11131→10012→10027→10198. After 2021, it significantly dropped by about 3500 places, and in the last 3 years it has stabilized in the 10000–10200 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 10198. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 103 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 109 students in 2024–2025; in 2026, the plan is 108 students, a slight decrease of 1 compared to 2025, pausing the expansion trend and slightly tightening competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Northeastern University. On the Soft Science main ranking, Northeastern University is approximately 38th (2026), with a stable ranking between 36–39 in recent years, indicating high recognition. The reputation evaluation of Northeastern University's main campus in 2026 is neutral/mixed, involving campus disputes. Douyin popularity ranks 82nd overall (average), with relatively low short video exposure. No significant enrollment gaps have been recorded. It relies on Northeastern University's A+ Control Science and Engineering, A Computer Science and Technology, A- Mechanical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Software Engineering, etc., which highly correspond to its enrollment majors such as Computer, Automation, and Mechanical categories, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, with strong social application willingness. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 79,969, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 2025 (80,421), keeping competition pressure roughly the same. The university is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, relatively close to Jilin, within the radiation range of the Northeast region, offering some regional affinity for Jilin examinees. Its enrollment scale in Jilin is relatively large (about 108–109 students), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized in the 10000–10200 range over the past 3 years, the 2026 enrollment plan slightly decreases by 1, the number of Physics Category examinees slightly decreases, and high-popularity majors like Computer/Electronic Information continue to attract high-scoring students, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 10198 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10200, with a range of 9700–10700.
